ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "tournament_type" TEXT /* Type of the tournament (e.g., Swiss-system, single-elimination) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tournament is held */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the organization hosting the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the tournament */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Total number of teams participating in the tournament */,
  "number_of_stages" INTEGER /* Total number of stages in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the team */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "home_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "current_rank" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the stage (e.g., Group Stage, Knockout Stage) */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament the stage belongs to */,
  "stage_order" INTEGER /* Order of the stage within the tournament */,
  "number_of_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches in the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stages_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stage the match belongs to */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team participating in the match */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team participating in the match */,
  "coef1" REAL /* Coefficient for the first team */,
  "coef2" REAL /* Coefficient for the second team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match is played */,
  "referee_name" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match outcome */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the outcome belongs to */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "loser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "winning_score" INTEGER /* Score of the winning team */,
  "losing_score" INTEGER /* Score of the losing team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the match went into overtime */,
  "penalty_shootout" INTEGER /* Indicates if the match was decided by a penalty shootout */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the match outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_outcomes_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_teams" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Seed of the team in the tournament */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the team entered the tournament */,
  "previous_rank" INTEGER /* Team's rank in the previous tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stage_teams" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stage */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "stage_seed" INTEGER /* Seed of the team in the stage */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the team entered the stage */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Performance score of the team in the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id", "team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, spectator) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match the prediction is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the prediction */,
  "predicted_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team predicted to win */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "winning_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage of the team */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the team */,
  "total_goals_scored" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team in the tournament */,
  "total_goals_conceded" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team in the tournament */,
  "number_of_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team in the tournament */,
  "number_of_losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team in the tournament */,
  "number_of_draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author of the news article */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the original source of the news article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article (e.g., match report, team update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, spectator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g., administrator, analyst, spectator) */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role (e.g., view matches, edit teams) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role", "permission")
)
